eligibility_rules.income: Low income or receiving means-tested benefits (usually under £35,000 household income)
eligibility_rules.residency: Lived in UK for last 6 months
eligibility_rules.disability_level: Child must have high support needs in 3+ areas

charity_grants.charity_name: Newlife the Charity for Disabled Children
grant_types: Equipment grants (wheelchairs, specialist beds, car seats)
charity_grants.how_to_apply: Application through a professional (e.g. OT, physiotherapist).

grant_types: Specialist equipment (adapted trikes, sensory equipment, communication aids)

eligibility_rules.condition: Children and young people with disabilities

charity_grants.how_to_apply: Check website for current funding rounds.

grant_types: Fundraising support for specialist healthcare, therapies, and equipment not available on the NHS

eligibility_rules.description: Families of sick and disabled children under 18 (or up to 25 in some cases) needing to raise funds for medical treatment or equipment.

charity_grants.how_to_apply: Register as a beneficiary family to start a fundraising campaign with charity status.

grant_types: Accessible gardens and therapeutic support in NHS spinal injury centres

eligibility_rules.description: Patients and families using NHS spinal injury centres where a garden is established.

charity_grants.how_to_apply: Accessed via the clinical team at the spinal centre.

grant_types: Direct grants for people on low income

eligibility_rules.description: Uses a search tool to find specific grants based on background, occupation, or medical condition.
